cards.desc: A person in the guise of a merchant weighs money in a pair of scales and distributes it to the needy and distressed. It is a testimony to his own success in life, as well as to his goodness of heart.
cards.meaning_up_zh: 礼物，礼物，满足另一说说注意，警惕现在是接受的时间，当前的繁荣等。
cards.meaning_rev_zh: 欲望、贪婪、嫉妒、嫉妒、幻觉。
cards.desc_zh: 一个伪装成商人的人用天平称量金钱，并将其分发给有需要和贫困的人。这是他人生成功的见证，也是他内心善良的见证。

cards.name: Seven of Pentacles
cards.meaning_up: These are exceedingly contradictory; in the main, it is a card of money, business, barter; but one reading gives altercation, quarrels--and another innocence, ingenuity, purgation.
cards.meaning_rev: Cause for anxiety regarding money which it may be proposed to lend.
cards.desc: A young man, leaning on his staff, looks intently at seven pentacles attached to a clump of greenery on his right; one would say that these were his treasures and that his heart was there.
cards.meaning_up_zh: 这些都是极其矛盾的；从本质上讲，它是一张金钱、商业、物物交换的牌；但一种解读给出了争吵、争吵，而另一说则给出了纯真、独创性和净化。
cards.meaning_rev_zh: 对可能被建议借出的资金感到焦虑的原因。
cards.desc_zh: 一个年轻人拄着拐杖，专注地看着右手边一丛绿叶上挂着的七个星币。人们会说这些是他的宝藏，他的心就在那里。

cards.name: Eight of Pentacles
cards.meaning_up: Work, employment, commission, craftsmanship, skill in craft and business, perhaps in the preparatory stage.
cards.meaning_rev: Voided ambition, vanity, cupidity, exaction, usury. It may also signify the possession of skill, in the sense of the ingenious mind turned to cunning and intrigue.
cards.desc: An artist in stone at his work, which he exhibits in the form of trophies.
cards.meaning_up_zh: 工作、就业、佣金、工艺、工艺和商业技能，也许处于准备阶段。
cards.meaning_rev_zh: 虚无的野心、虚荣、贪婪、勒索、高利贷。它也可能意味着拥有技能，即巧妙的头脑转向狡猾和阴谋。
cards.desc_zh: 一位石头艺术家正在创作他的作品，并以奖杯的形式展示。

cards.name: Nine of Pentacles
cards.meaning_up: Prudence, safety, success, accomplishment, certitude, discernment.
cards.meaning_rev: Roguery, deception, voided project, bad faith.
cards.desc: A woman, with a bird upon her wrist, stands amidst a great abundance of grapevines in the garden of a manorial house. It is a wide domain, suggesting plenty in all things. Possibly it is her own possession and testifies to material well-being.
cards.meaning_up_zh: 谨慎、安全、成功、成就、确信、洞察力。
cards.meaning_rev_zh: 狡诈、欺骗、无效项目、不诚实。
cards.desc_zh: 一位女士手腕上戴着一只小鸟，站在庄园花园里繁茂的葡萄藤丛中。这是一个广阔的领域，暗示着一切事物都有丰富的内容。这可能是她自己的财产，证明了她的物质财富。

cards.name: Ten of Pentacles
cards.meaning_up: Gain, riches; family matters, archives, extraction, the abode of a family.
cards.meaning_rev: Chance, fatality, loss, robbery, games of hazard; sometimes gift, dowry, pension.
cards.desc: A man and woman beneath an archway which gives entrance to a house and domain. They are accompanied by a child, who looks curiously at two dogs accosting an ancient personage seated in the foreground. The child's hand is on one of them.
cards.meaning_up_zh: 收获、财富；家庭事务、档案、出身、家庭住所。
cards.meaning_rev_zh: 机会、死亡、损失、抢劫、危险游戏；有时是礼物、嫁妆、养老金。
cards.desc_zh: 一个男人和一个女人在拱门下，拱门通向房屋和领地。他们身边有一个孩子，孩子好奇地看着两只狗正在与坐在前景的一位古代人物搭话。孩子的手放在其中一个身上。

cards.name: Page of Swords
cards.meaning_up: Authority, overseeing, secret service, vigilance, spying, examination, and the qualities thereto belonging.
cards.meaning_rev: More evil side of these qualities; what is unforeseen, unprepared state; sickness is also intimated.
cards.desc: A lithe, active figure holds a sword upright in both hands, while in the act of swift walking. He is passing over rugged land, and about his way the clouds are collocated wildly. He is alert and lithe, looking this way and that, as if an expected enemy might appear at any moment.
cards.meaning_up_zh: 权威、监督、特勤、警惕、间谍、检查以及其所属的品质。
cards.meaning_rev_zh: 这些品质更邪恶的一面；什么是不可预见的、没有准备的状态；也预示着疾病。
cards.desc_zh: 人物轻盈活泼，双手高举剑，快步行走。他正经过崎岖不平的土地，途中云彩疯狂地排列着。他警惕而轻盈，东张西望，仿佛随时都有敌人出现。

cards.name: Knight of Swords
cards.meaning_up: Skill, bravery, capacity, defence, address, enmity, wrath, war, destruction, opposition, resistance, ruin. There is therefore a sense in which the card signifies death, but it carries this meaning only in its proximity to other cards of fatality.
cards.meaning_rev: Imprudence, incapacity, extravagance.
cards.desc: He is riding in full course, as if scattering his enemies. In the design he is really a prototypical hero of romantic chivalry. He might almost be Galahad, whose sword is swift and sure because he is clean of heart.
cards.meaning_up_zh: 技能、勇敢、能力、防御、辞令、敌意、愤怒、战争、破坏、反对、抵抗、毁灭。因此，这张牌在某种意义上意味着死亡，但它只有在与其他死亡牌接近时才具有这种意义。
cards.meaning_rev_zh: 轻率、无能、奢侈。
cards.desc_zh: 他一路驰骋，仿佛驱散了敌人。在设计上他确实是一个典型的浪漫骑士英雄原型。他可能几乎就是加拉哈德，他的剑迅速而坚定，因为他内心纯洁。

cards.name: Queen of Swords
cards.meaning_up: Widowhood, female sadness and embarrassment, absence, sterility, mourning, privation, separation.
cards.meaning_rev: Malice, bigotry, artifice, prudery, bale, deceit.
cards.desc: Her right hand raises the weapon vertically and the hilt rests on an arm of her royal chair the left hand is extended, the arm raised her countenance is severe but chastened; it suggests familiarity with sorrow. It does not represent mercy, and, her sword notwithstanding, she is scarcely a symbol of power.
cards.meaning_up_zh: 守寡、女性的悲伤和尴尬、缺席、不育、哀悼、匮乏、分离。
cards.meaning_rev_zh: 恶意、偏执、诡计、假正经、恶意、欺骗。
cards.desc_zh: 她的右手垂直举起武器，剑柄搭在皇家椅子的扶手上，左手伸出，手臂举起，她的表情严肃但又克制；它暗示着对悲伤的熟悉。它并不代表仁慈，而且，尽管她有剑，但她几乎不是权力的象征。

cards.name: King of Swords
cards.meaning_up: Whatsoever arises out of the idea of judgment and all its connexions-power, command, authority, militant intelligence, law, offices of the crown, and so forth.
cards.meaning_rev: Cruelty, perversity, barbarity, perfidy, evil intention.
cards.desc: He sits in judgment, holding the unsheathed sign of his suit. He recalls, of course, the conventional Symbol of justice in the Trumps Major, and he may represent this virtue, but he is rather the power of life and death, in virtue of his office.
cards.meaning_up_zh: 无论是从判断的概念及其所有联系中产生的东西——权力、命令、权威、军事情报、法律、王室职位等等。
cards.meaning_rev_zh: 残忍、乖僻、野蛮、背信弃义、邪恶意图。
cards.desc_zh: 他拿着出鞘的花色象征坐在审判席上。当然，他记得大阿卡纳中正义的传统象征，他可能代表着这种美德，但由于他的职位，他更确切地说是生与死的力量。

cards.name: Ace of Swords
cards.meaning_up: Triumph, the excessive degree in everything, conquest, triumph of force. It is a card of great force, in love as well as in hatred. The crown may carry a much higher significance than comes usually within the sphere of fortune-telling.
cards.meaning_rev: The same, but the results are disastrous; another account says--conception, childbirth, augmentation, multiplicity.
cards.desc: A hand issues from a cloud, grasping as word, the point of which is encircled by a crown.
cards.meaning_up_zh: 胜利，一切事物的过度程度，征服，武力的胜利。这是一张无论在爱还是在仇恨上都具有强大力量的牌。王冠的意义可能比通常算命领域更高。
cards.meaning_rev_zh: 一样，但结果却是灾难性的；另一种说法是——受孕、分娩、增强、多样性。
cards.desc_zh: 一只手从云中伸出，抓着文字，其尖端被王冠环绕。

cards.name: Two of Swords
cards.meaning_up: Conformity and the equipoise which it suggests, courage, friendship, concord in a state of arms; another reading gives tenderness, affection, intimacy. The suggestion of harmony and other favourable readings must be considered in a qualified manner, as Swords generally are not symbolical of beneficent forces in human affairs.
cards.meaning_rev: Imposture, falsehood, duplicity, disloyalty.
cards.desc: A hoodwinked female figure balances two swords upon her shoulders.
cards.meaning_up_zh: 它所暗示的顺从和平衡、勇气、友谊、武装状态下的和谐； 另一种说法给人温柔、感情、亲密感。必须以合格的方式考虑和谐和其他有利读物的建议，因为剑通常并不象征人类事务中的仁慈力量。
cards.meaning_rev_zh: 欺骗、谎言、口是心非、不忠。
cards.desc_zh: 一个蒙面的女性人物肩上扛着两把剑。

cards.name: Three of Swords
cards.meaning_up: Removal, absence, delay, division, rupture, dispersion, and all that the design signifies naturally, being too simple and obvious to call for specific enumeration.
cards.meaning_rev: Mental alienation, error, loss, distraction, disorder, confusion.
cards.desc: Three swords piercing a heart; cloud and rain behind.
cards.meaning_up_zh: 移除、缺席、延迟、分割、破裂、分散，以及设计自然所意味着的一切，都过于简单和明显，无需具体列举。
cards.meaning_rev_zh: 精神疏远、错误、失落、分心、紊乱、混乱。
cards.desc_zh: 三剑刺心；后面有云和雨。

cards.name: Four of Swords
cards.meaning_up: Vigilance, retreat, solitude, hermit's repose, exile, tomb and coffin. It is these last that have suggested the design.
cards.meaning_rev: Wise administration, circumspection, economy, avarice, precaution, testament.
cards.desc: The effigy of a knight in the attitude of prayer, at full length upon his tomb.
cards.meaning_up_zh: 警惕、隐退、孤独、隐士的休憩、流放、坟墓和棺材。正是这些最后提出了设计。
cards.meaning_rev_zh: 明智的管理、谨慎、节约、贪婪、预防、遗嘱。
cards.desc_zh: 一位骑士的雕像在他的坟墓上以完整的姿势祈祷。

cards.name: Five of Swords
cards.meaning_up: Degradation, destruction, revocation, infamy, dishonour, loss, with the variants and analogues of these.
cards.meaning_rev: The same; burial and obsequies.
cards.desc: A disdainful man looks after two retreating and dejected figures. Their swords lie upon the ground. He carries two others on his left shoulder, and a third sword is in his right hand, point to earth. He is the master in possession of the field.
cards.meaning_up_zh: 贬低、破坏、撤销、耻辱、耻辱、损失，以及这些的变体和类似物。
cards.meaning_rev_zh: 相同;埋葬和葬礼。
cards.desc_zh: 一个轻蔑的男人看着两个垂头丧气的背影。他们的剑躺在地上。他的左肩上扛着另外两把剑，右手握着第三把剑，指向地面。他是这个领域的主人。

cards.name: Six of Swords
cards.meaning_up: Journey by water, route, way, envoy, commissionary, expedient.
cards.meaning_rev: Declaration, confession, publicity; one account says that it is a proposal of love.
cards.desc: A ferryman carrying passengers in his punt to the further shore. The course is smooth, and seeing that the freight is light, it may be noted that the work is not beyond his strength.
cards.meaning_up_zh: 水路、路线、途径、使者、委托、权宜之计。
cards.meaning_rev_zh: 声明、坦白、公开；有一种说法说这是一份爱的求婚。
cards.desc_zh: 摆渡人用平底船载着乘客到更远的海岸。过程很顺利，而且看运费也轻，可见这项工作并没有超出他的能力范围。

cards.name: Seven of Swords
cards.meaning_up: Design, attempt, wish, hope, confidence; also quarrelling, a plan that may fail, annoyance. The design is uncertain in its import, because the significations are widely at variance with each other.
cards.meaning_rev: Good advice, counsel, instruction, slander, babbling.
cards.desc: A man in the act of carrying away five swords rapidly; the two others of the card remain stuck in the ground. A camp is close at hand.
cards.meaning_up_zh: 设计、尝试、愿望、希望、信心；还有争吵，可能失败的计划，烦恼。该设计的重要性是不确定的，因为其含义彼此之间存在很大差异。
cards.meaning_rev_zh: 好的建议、忠告、指导、诽谤、胡言乱语。
cards.desc_zh: 一名男子正在快速夺走五把剑；该卡的另外两张仍卡在地上。一个营地就在附近。

cards.name: Eight of Swords
cards.meaning_up: Bad news, violent chagrin, crisis, censure, power in trammels, conflict, calumny; also sickness.
cards.meaning_rev: Disquiet, difficulty, opposition, accident, treachery; what is unforeseen; fatality.
cards.desc: A woman, bound and hoodwinked, with the swords of the card about her. Yet it is rather a card of temporary durance than of irretrievable bondage.
cards.meaning_up_zh: 坏消息、强烈的懊恼、危机、谴责、权力的束缚、冲突、诽谤；亦病。
cards.meaning_rev_zh: 不安、困难、反对、意外、背叛；什么是不可预见的；致命性。
cards.desc_zh: 一个女人，被捆绑着，蒙着眼睛，身上挂着牌上的剑。然而，它更像是一张暂时的耐久牌，而不是无法挽回的束缚。

cards.name: Nine of Swords
cards.meaning_up: Death, failure, miscarriage, delay, deception, disappointment, despair.
cards.meaning_rev: Imprisonment, suspicion, doubt, reasonable fear, shame.
cards.desc: One seated on her couch in lamentation, with the swords over her. She is as one who knows no sorrow which is like unto hers. It is a card of utter desolation.
cards.meaning_up_zh: 死亡、失败、流产、延误、欺骗、失望、绝望。
cards.meaning_rev_zh: 监禁、怀疑、怀疑、合理的恐惧、羞耻。
cards.desc_zh: 其中一个坐在她的沙发上，悲伤地坐在她的沙发上，剑在她身上。她就像一个不知道任何悲伤能与她相比的人。这是一张彻底荒凉的牌。

cards.name: Ten of Swords
cards.meaning_up: Whatsoever is intimated by the design; also pain, affliction, tears, sadness, desolation. It is not especially a card of violent death.
cards.meaning_rev: Advantage, profit, success, favour, but none of these are permanent; also power and authority.
cards.desc: A prostrate figure, pierced by all the swords belonging to the card.
cards.meaning_up_zh: 设计暗示的任何内容；还有痛苦、苦难、泪水、悲伤、荒凉。它并不是一张特别会导致暴力死亡的牌。
cards.meaning_rev_zh: 优势、利润、成功、恩惠，但这些都不是永久的；还有权力和权威。
cards.desc_zh: 一个倒地的身影，被卡牌上所有的剑刺穿。
